observation.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c/answer.json') as f:
    j0 = json.load(f)
with open('/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/functional-0/001_var_defn.sysu.c/answer.json') as f:
    j1 = json.load(f)
# Compare top-level keys
print('000 keys:', list(j0.keys()))
print('001 keys:', list(j1.keys()))
print('000 inner kinds:', [x['kind'] for x in j0['inner']])
print('001 inner kinds:', [x['kind'] for x in j1['inner']])
"
